{{Event Header|StS2 Sapphire Seed.png}} {{E|Sapphire Seed|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Overgrowth}}. == Options == {{Frame|Consume}} {{TS|positive||Heal 9 HP.}} {{TS|positive||[[Upgrade]] a card in your Deck.}}
{{Frame|Plant and Nourish}} {{TS|positive||{{KW|Enchant||2}} a card with {{KW|Sown||2}}.}} == Dialogue ==
You narrowly avoid stepping on a bright, sharp... seed? Its unmistakable color gives away that it's a {{TS|blue||Sapphire Seed}}! Weren't these incredible seeds supposed to be extinct!? Legends say that consuming one can greatly {{TS|gold||amplify your endurance}}, but what if you plant and nourish it instead?
{{Frame|Consume}}
You ingest the Sapphire Seed and within moments your limbs feel more agile, colors sharpen, and you sense the souls of nearby foes. Good thing you didn't step on it.
{{Frame|Plant and Nourish}}
You scour the {{TS|green||Overgrowth}} and find a pot with {{TS|aqua||good aeration}}. Then, you trek around, searching for an untouched spot where {{TS|orange||light peeks through a cracked wall}}. Carefully, you reinforce the pot with bark and vine to {{TS|green||camouflage}} it, fill it with loamy, nutrient-rich soil, and nestle the {{TS|blue||seed}} just beneath the surface. Finally, you gather dew from nearby plants and pour it over the soil. Grow big, little seed... Unknowingly, the {{TS|blue||Sapphire Seed}} attaches to you spiritually. Thankful of your hard work.
[[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
